page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6p.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage options and a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates average multi-core and memory performance. The instance achieved a multi-core stress-ng CPU score of 7021.12 and a PassMark CPU score of 8301.57, placing it in the middle tier of tested hardware. Memory bandwidth is also average, with read-only small block cached speeds reaching 392.37 GB/sec and uncached large block write speeds at 37.46 GB/sec. However, single-core performance is relatively weak, as shown by a stress-ng single-core score of 1317.89 and a weak single-threaded gzip compression speed of 22.74 GB/sec.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced resource profile, the ecs.re6p.2xlarge offers stable performance for general-purpose workloads. It is well-suited for applications requiring consistent multi-core processing without extreme single-thread demands, such as static web serving, Redis key-value stores, and moderate database operations. The lack of bundled local storage and GPUs makes it a cost-efficient choice for workloads that rely on external block storage and do not require hardware acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6p.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 8 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8269CY x86_64 processor clocked at 2.5 GHz. It is configured with 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core, but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Performance benchmarks place this server in the average tier for multi-core CPU execution, memory bandwidth, and database operations, though single-core performance is relatively weak. Supported by advanced vector extensions (AVX-512), it is best suited for workloads such as static web serving, Redis caching, and moderate database operations that benefit from dedicated CPU resources without requiring high single-threaded performance or local NVMe storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6p.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 32 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering average multi-core performance for web serving and database workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6p.2xlarge is an 8-core Intel Xeon instance with 32 GB RAM, offering balanced general-purpose performance on the KVM hypervisor.
tagline: A dedicated eight-core processor instance with balanced memory configuration for stable multi-core workloads and web serving applications.

32.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
